name: Nano Banana Pro Prompts Recommend
description: AI skill for OpenClaw & Claude Code that recommends from 10,000+ Nano Banana Pro (Gemini) image prompts. Features smart search by use case, content remix mode, and sample images. Automated twice-daily updates keep the prompt library current.
review: Prompt recommendation service with 10,000+ curated prompts for Gemini. Conditional approval with content safety requirements. APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS: (1) Filter explicit imagery, (2) Add deepfake disclaimers, (3) Audit celebrity prompts to prevent misuse.
conditions: Filter explicit imagery from prompt library
Add deepfake disclaimers to relevant prompts
Audit all celebrity/person-related prompts to prevent misuse

drax_results.notes: 10,000+ prompt library with automated updates, smart search, and content remix mode verified.
